title: Monster Hunter Frontier X Evangelion Collaboration July 25
display_title: Monster Hunter Frontier X Evangelion Collaboration July 25
wikitext:
[]: Monster Hunter Frontier X Evangelion Collaboration - July 25             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jul 17, 2015 7:40 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pnEmHEDLYaM http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2015/07/17/video-monster-hunter-frontier-g-x-evangelion-collaboration-previewed It looks like Monster Hunter Frontier G is getting some pretty sweet Evangelion equipment as part of a crossover to celebrate the bluray release next month. According to the article, the goods include plugsuit costumes, armors of Eva 00 and 01, the Lance of Longinus, the Positron Rifle, and some kind of AT Field as weapons. It's a shame this isn't out in the US. I really want those Eva armors!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jul 17, 2015 7:44 pm Seeing an Eva attack a Giant Tiger monster in a video game is almost surreal

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2015 10:41 pm Thanks for the info! News post'ed! tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 21, 2015 8:17 pm Weird that there's no huntable Angels. Some of their designs would readily lend themselves to a Monster Hunter makeover, even.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Wed Jul 22, 2015 8:02 am No Asuka? How dare they! This boy is sticking to Phantasy Star then: http://i.imgur.com/DKgT0JX.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Nov 13, 2015 3:57 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4177.html More crossover! Now you can get Asuka/Eva 02 and Kaworu/Eva 06!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 16, 2015 4:01 pm Twitter'ed! (Ow my spleen!) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 24, 2015 1:14 am Someone please explain to me why the fuck you would do a crossover with a video game where the whole idea is to hunt down and gruesomely kill giant monsters, and then utterly fail to make any use whatsoever of the "giant monsters" part. The only reason this crossover has to exist at all is to let you hunt Angels in the game. Whoever is responsible for the current, hopelessly misguided state of affairs should be fired and forced to shave their head then walk through Akihabara in the nude. (Granted, if they did manage to provide the Angels to fight, then Eva skins for your hunter would logically follow, but never one without the other.)

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Nov 24, 2015 5:00 am Reichu wrote: Someone please explain to me why the fuck you would do a crossover with a video game where the whole idea is to hunt down and gruesomely kill giant monsters, and then utterly fail to make any use whatsoever of the "giant monsters" part. The only reason this crossover has to exist at all is to let you hunt Angels in the game. Whoever is responsible for the current, hopelessly misguided state of affairs should be fired and forced to shave their head then walk through Akihabara in the nude. (Granted, if they did manage to provide the Angels to fight, then Eva skins for your hunter would logically follow, but never one without the other.)
